meaning: adj.不习惯的,不用的,不使用的,从未用过的,积累的
examples: To compound the delays, the unused airport is resulting in massive costs.
They had been hid in the unused gallery listening to their own funeral sermon!
The practice of destroying unsold stock, and even rolls of unused fabric, is commonplace for luxury labels.
Cipriani was named on the bench for last weekend's league match with Leicester, but was an unused substitute.
The resale program has pumped some unused tickets back into circulation, but it is lightly used.
